basis: LCX-PPL-00/01 gap freeze, evidence baseline, claim boundary, label drift, and HRO validator stabilization are recorded.
LCX-PPL-02 legal People domain contracts are locally validated.
LCX-PPL-03 relationship ledger foundation is locally validated.
LCX-PPL-04 legal People APIs are route-backed and locally validated.
LCX-PPL-05 legal People UI and Client/Matter backlinks are locally validated.
LCX-PPL-06 conflict, ethical-wall, permission linkage, and reviewer receipt surfaces are locally validated.
LCX-HRO-07 blocked HR/provider backlog remains gated and is not exposed as fake-working UI.
LCX-QA-08 browser QA drives the visible local product surfaces and records a receipt.

upgrade_evidence_required: Production deployment receipt and environment-specific smoke evidence.
Legal owner approval for conflict, ethical-wall, and sensitive People access policies.
External provider readiness receipts where provider-backed HR or legal integrations are claimed.
Enterprise trust/security review receipts before enterprise trust claims.
Go-live approval separate from local runtime QA.
